description:
A backup software for your Mac or Windows PC.


Improvements
- pCloud uploads now retry transient errors for several minutes before giving up, improving reliability when pCloud is temporarily unavailable.
- Added a workaround for Cloudflare R2 which isn't quite S3-compatible -- it returns an x-amz-version-id response header on object writes even though the object isn't versioned.
Changes
- Arq now logs the S3 bucket versioning status at the start of each backup.
